title: eos service configuration
description: Configuration schema for eos service.yaml files

name.description: Unique name for the service. Used to reference it in all eos commands.

command.description: The entry point script or binary to run. Relative to the service directory or an absolute path.

port.description: Port the service listens on. Displayed in eos status.

memory_limit_mb.description: Soft memory limit in megabytes. eos will restart the service when exceeded.

env_file.description: Path to a .env file to load into the service's environment. Relative to the service directory.

runtime.description: Runtime configuration. Required when the service needs a specific runtime binary (Node.js, Bun, Deno).

path.description: Absolute or home-relative (~/) path to the directory containing the runtime binary.

log_sinks.description: External log sink plugins. Each sink receives all service log lines via its stdin as NDJSON. eos manages the plugin process lifetime.

type.description: Sink type. eos discovers the plugin binary as eos-sink-{type} on $PATH.

exec.description: Explicit path to the plugin binary. Overrides the eos-sink-{type} PATH lookup.

args.description: Extra arguments passed to the plugin binary.

buffer_size.description: Number of log records to buffer in memory when the plugin is slow. Oldest records are dropped on overflow. Default: 4096.

restart_delay_ms.description: Milliseconds to wait before restarting a crashed plugin. Default: 5000.

streams.description: Which output streams to route to this sink. Default: both stdout and stderr.

options.description: Plugin-specific configuration. Passed to the plugin as JSON via the EOS_SINK_OPTIONS environment variable. eos does not validate this field.
